CommunityInformation.Name: IW4MAdmin - Configure In IW4MAdminSettings.json
CommunityInformation.Description: IW4MAdmin is an administration tool for IW4x, Pluto T6, Pluto IW5, CoD4x, TeknoMW3, and most Call of Duty® dedicated servers. It allows complete control of your server; from changing maps, to banning players, IW4MAdmin monitors and records activity on your server(s). With plugin support, extending its functionality is a breeze.

Webfront.ScriptInjection: <link rel="canonical" href="http://iw4madmin-ar.ddns.net/" /><script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-WMG705MJMD"></script><script>window.dataLayer=window.dataLayer||[];function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}gtag('js',new Date());gtag('config','G-WMG705MJMD');</script><script>(function(){const applyCharts=()=>{if(!window.Chart||!Chart.instances)return;for(const k in Chart.instances){const c=Chart.instances[k];if(!c||!c.data)continue;c.data.datasets.forEach(d=>{d.borderColor='#b53e51';d.backgroundColor=document.body.classList.contains('dark-mode')?'rgba(181,62,81,0.1)':'rgba(181,62,81,0.25)';d.borderWidth=1;d.pointRadius=0});c.options.maintainAspectRatio=false;const H=80;c.canvas.style.height=H+'px';c.canvas.style.maxHeight=H+'px';c.canvas.height=H;if(c.canvas.parentElement)c.canvas.parentElement.style.height=H+'px';c.update();}};const KEY='iw4m_selected_server';const applyServers=()=>{const links=document.querySelectorAll('a[href*=\"/Server/Scoreboard\"]');const saved=localStorage.getItem(KEY);links.forEach(a=>{const href=a.getAttribute('href');if(saved&&href===saved)a.classList.add('iw4m-server-selected');if(a.dataset.sel)return;a.dataset.sel=1;a.addEventListener('click',()=>{localStorage.setItem(KEY,href);links.forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('iw4m-server-selected'));a.classList.add('iw4m-server-selected');});});};const run=()=>{applyCharts();applyServers();};new MutationObserver(run).observe(document.body,{childList:true,subtree:true});window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',run);})();</script>

GlobalRules: Keep grenade launcher use to a minimum
